vehicle.label: Long-Range Surveillance Wing
vehicle.desc: Fixed-wing flying-wing UAV, 2m wingspan, 4+ hour endurance

parts.label: Center Body Pod
parts.spec: Flying-wing center pod, equipment bay door, wing-spar reinforcement, motor pylon at rear

parts.label: Wing Spar (2-piece)
parts.spec: 20mm CFRP main spar, 2-piece centerjoint, anti-rotation key, 800mm half-span each

parts.label: Wing Rib Set x 12
parts.spec: Wing rib NACA airfoil profile, lightening pockets, leading edge sock, trailing edge taper

parts.label: Elevon Servo Pocket x 2
parts.spec: Elevon servo pocket, MG90S or DS215MG, control horn linkage, removable access cover

parts.label: Motor + Pusher Prop Mount
parts.spec: Rear pusher 2814 BLDC mount, 10x7 folding prop clearance, thrust line +1deg down

parts.label: GPS + Pitot Boom
parts.spec: Nose boom 8mm, GPS at tip, pitot static port forward, BEC airflow shielded

parts.label: Camera Gimbal Bay
parts.spec: Forward downward camera gimbal bay 70mm deep, 2-axis micro gimbal, optical window

parts.label: Battery Bay (Slide)
parts.spec: 4S 16000mAh Li-ion slide-in bay, CG adjust slot, top access hatch, balance lead window

parts.label: Integration Service Backbone
parts.spec: Wing/fuselage integration service backbone with assembly_datum pads, harness_raceway, service_hatch, connector_keying, anti-rotation wing datum, and visible load-path inspection marks

requirements: Provide structural support and aerodynamic profile for the wing
Include airfoil section, control surface cutout, hinge line, winglet, elevon, lightening pockets, leading edge sock, trailing edge taper
Ensure continuous load path from skin to spar
Support thermal dissipation through foam core
Allow service access for battery replacement and maintenance

requirements: Actuation system integration

verify.rule: budget_rule
training_quality_rule
interface_rule
joint_evidence_rule
training_quality_rule

risk.desc: Potential thermal stress due to uneven cooling air distribution.
risk.mit: Implement a more uniform cooling inlet design.

risk.desc: Risk of structural failure at the leading edge attachment flange under extreme loads.
risk.mit: Conduct additional structural testing and reinforce if necessary.

risk.desc: Insufficient access for maintenance and inspection of internal components.
risk.mit: Increase size of access window and ensure clear labeling.

risk.desc: Risk of electrical interference between motor pod and equipment bay door.
risk.mit: Ensure proper shielding and spacing between electrical harnesses.

risk.desc: Process limitations may affect the final surface finish of the FDM parts.
risk.mit: Use post-processing techniques to improve surface finish.

_subsystem_plan.subsystem_role: Equipment Bay Door, Wing-Spar Reinforcement, Motor Pylon Mount

physics_paths.description: Cooling air intake from leading edge to trailing edge
Wing flexure along spanwise axis
Electrical harness routing from equipment bay to motor pylon

generated_parts.label: Wing Spar (2-piece)
generated_parts.spec: 20mm CFRP main spar, 2-piece centerjoint, anti-rotation key, 800mm half-span each

requirements: Structures: Main spar, ribs, carry-through, fuselage frames; continuous load path
Interfaces: Spar_socket, anti_rotation_key, carry_through
Materials: EPP foam core + CFRP spar
Manufacturing: FDM + foam core
Interfaces: At least three adjacent-module interfaces or mounting datums
Interfaces: At least three negative/service features

verify.rule: cad_brief.mass_est_g must be a numeric grams value, and verify must include a mass/budget check.

verify.value: All required evidence_features present in part_tree/geometry_ops.
verify.rule: Each required evidence_feature must appear in part_tree/geometry_ops.

verify.value: Adjacent-module interfaces and mounting datums are reciprocal.
verify.rule: Name exact neighboring subsystem labels when they mate, and choose connection_type + DOF + clearance_mm + required_feature so the neighbor can declare the same joint family back.

verify.value: Visible insert/washer/locking/preload evidence for critical joints.
verify.rule: Critical joints need visible insert/washer/locking/preload evidence and torque_Nm or preload intent.

risk.desc: Potential misalignment during assembly due to complex interface geometries.
risk.mit: Implement detailed assembly instructions and visual aids.

risk.desc: Risk of thermal expansion causing structural stress if thermal management is inadequate.
risk.mit: Conduct thermal analysis and adjust material selection or cooling strategy as needed.

risk.desc: Possible damage to service access cut during maintenance operations.
risk.mit: Design protective covers for service access cut during non-maintenance periods.

_subsystem_plan.subsystem_role: Main spar, ribs, carry-through, fuselage frames; continuous load path

physics_paths.description: Lift and landing loads transferred from wing skin to fuselage frames via main spar and ribs.
Thermal management from ambient air to battery bay via wing spar.
Propeller rotation transmitted from motor to propeller via wing spar.

integration_opportunities.description: Integrate wing spar with wing skin and fuselage frames for continuous load path.
Integrate sensor pocket with payload bay for mission-specific sensors.
Integrate service access cut with battery bay for easy maintenance.

verification_focus.description: Ensure continuous load path from wing skin to fuselage frames.
Verify thermal management from ambient air to battery bay.

generated_parts.label: Wing Rib Set x 12
generated_parts.spec: Wing rib NACA airfoil profile, lightening pockets, leading edge sock, trailing edge taper

requirements: Provide structural support and aerodynamic profile for the wing
Include airfoil section, control surface cutout, hinge line, winglet, elevon, lightening pockets, leading edge sock, trailing edge taper
Ensure continuous load path from skin to spar

verify.rule: All required fields are present and correctly formatted.
Total mass does not exceed 200g per rib.
P0 internal_feature_targets appear as part_tree children and geometry_ops ids or targets.
Interfaces with adjacent modules are reciprocal and clearly defined.
Critical joints have visible insert/washer/locking/preload evidence.

risk.desc: Potential thermal expansion issues due to different materials.
risk.mit: Use compatible materials or incorporate thermal expansion joints.

risk.desc: Risk of insufficient stiffness if too many lightening pockets are added.
risk.mit: Conduct finite element analysis to ensure structural integrity.

risk.desc: Difficulty in maintaining precise alignment during assembly.
risk.mit: Implement more robust alignment features and improve manufacturing tolerances.

physics_paths.description: Distributed lift and aerodynamic loads transferred from skin to spar via rib connections.
Heat dissipation from sunlight absorbed by the wing surface through the foam core.
Access for battery replacement and maintenance.

integration_opportunities.description: Optimize airfoil shape for reduced drag and increased lift.
Increase number or size of lightening pockets for weight savings.
Add additional ribs or stiffeners for improved structural integrity.

verification_focus.description: Verify total mass does not exceed 200g per rib.
Ensure continuous load path from skin to spar.
Confirm heat dissipation through foam core.

verify.rule: Ensure all necessary fields are included in the blueprint.

verify.value: All P0 internal_feature_targets are mapped to part_tree children and geometry_ops.

verify.value: Interfaces with adjacent parts are clearly defined and reciprocal.

verify.value: Visible locking evidence exists for critical joints.

risk.desc: Potential thermal stress on servos due to insufficient cooling.
risk.mit: Increase the size of cooling vents and ensure proper airflow.

risk.desc: Difficulty in accessing the servos for maintenance.
risk.mit: Implement a quick-release mechanism for the access cover.

risk.desc: Risk of cable damage due to inadequate strain relief.
risk.mit: Ensure all cables have proper strain relief clamps and follow recommended bend radii.

_subsystem_plan.subsystem_role: Servo pockets, control horns, pushrod/linkage channels

physics_paths.description: Transmit linear motion from actuator to control surface via pushrod.

Removal of access cover for maintenance.
